context: Tests whether the agent correctly constructs a return flight by swapping origin and destination, converting a different local time to UTC, and keeping the same altitude/TAS.

checklist.name: Origin is KBDN
checklist.description: Origin for the return leg is KBDN (Bend Municipal), not KSQL

checklist.name: Destination is KSQL
checklist.description: Destination for the return leg is KSQL (San Carlos), not KBDN

checklist.name: Correct UTC time
checklist.description: Departure time is 21:30 UTC. 2:30 PM PDT = 14:30 local, PDT is UTC-7, so 14:30 + 7 = 21:30 UTC

checklist.name: Correct argument order
checklist.description: Command follows positional order: KBDN KSQL 2026-03-30 21:30 12000
